issue.title: login.kt.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3xlbbpn6omkgwosw8k8kwooooko8csc8bsykcbiwok.jpg?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/j59hi2278w8488ckgs80gk88kg4gos8nuw96zk9e9w.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

Information | Value
--- | ---

DNS setup: | Device or router settings
DNS server: | AdGuard DNS Default server
System version: | `dns.adguard-dns.com`

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.bbc.com/persian](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bbc.com%2Fpersian) ### Comment > There are two large ad blocks on the website "https://www.bbc.com/persian." Even when I manually select them to be blocked, it does not work. I have cleared my cache several times, quit and reopened the browser, disabled and re-enabled extensions, and removed all website data from Safari > Settings > Privacy > Manage Website Data. None of these steps have helped. ### Screenshots

issue.title: login.kt.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3xlbbpn6omkgwosw8k8kwooooko8csc8bsykcbiwok.jpg?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/j59hi2278w8488ckgs80gk88kg4gos8nuw96zk9e9w.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

Information | Value
--- | ---

comment.body:
Hi @rgsx, thanks for the report. 
I can mention you since it looks like you have the same GitHub username, based on your comment.

<details>
<summary>I was able to reproduce your problem when the search location was set to Mexico.</summary>

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fbbf5135-d7df-473d-88ad-e9458368a1c3)

</details>

However, this result is expected when unblocking via AdGuard’s UsefulAdsfilter list, which intentionally allows some contextual ads on search results pages: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/65864a7d018f9a3f921efb439ea36613da79cae8/UsefulAdsFilter/sections/usefulads.txt#L290

If you want to hide these ads, could you please add a user rule below? in "AdGuard for Mac Preferences → Filters"

```adblock
duckduckgo.com##[data-layout="ad"]
```

labels.name: A: In progress

issue.body:
> I do not know what  the request for me to  "Please check if AdGuard is detected on" is supposed to achieve...it simply leads me to a mafrket pahge for the product.  in addition, I have a problem with the dismissive  note "_This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity. Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs."___
> I pay for adguard, and therfore have a right to expect it to worlk as claimed, consistently.  When this does not occur, AdGuard has an obligation to address and resolve its failure to perform in exchange for payment it has received. Dismissal of the reported issue on the basis of "websites not popular enough" is in fact a breach of contracted services. On this basis, please consider this a notice  ands demand for service, Copies of this demand will be provided to AdGuard customer service, as well as the FTC, and DC Office of Consume Affairs.  Jeffrey P. Rockett, Esq. 

 _Originally posted by @rockettnyc in [#225844](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/225844#issuecomment-4024261898)_

comment.body:
Известно, что эта проблема решается с помощью AdGuard Extra.

Если вы пользуетесь AdGuard на устройствах Windows, Mac или Android, пожалуйста, убедитесь, что AdGuard Extra включена в настройках приложения.

Если вы используете расширение AdGuard для браузера, рекомендуется также установить AdGuard Extra.

* [Установка на браузеры Chrome, Edge или другие, основанные на Chromium](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Установка на Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)

issue.body:
> I do not know what  the request for me to  "Please check if AdGuard is detected on" is supposed to achieve...it simply leads me to a mafrket pahge for the product.  in addition, I have a problem with the dismissive  note "_This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity. Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs."___
> I pay for adguard, and therfore have a right to expect it to worlk as claimed, consistently.  When this does not occur, AdGuard has an obligation to address and resolve its failure to perform in exchange for payment it has received. Dismissal of the reported issue on the basis of "websites not popular enough" is in fact a breach of contracted services. On this basis, please consider this a notice  ands demand for service, Copies of this demand will be provided to AdGuard customer service, as well as the FTC, and DC Office of Consume Affairs.  Jeffrey P. Rockett, Esq. 

 _Originally posted by @rockettnyc in [#225844](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/225844#issuecomment-4024261898)_

comment.body:
@hj0210 스크린샷을 보아 Android "마이케이티" 앱을 사용 중이신 것으로 보입니다.

AdGuard DNS를 활성화한 상태에서 제 KT 계정으로 테스트해 보았습니다.  
비밀번호를 정상적으로 입력하면 로그인 인증이 성공적으로 진행됩니다.

제보에 첨부해 주신 "네트워크 오류 안내" 화면은 비밀번호가 올바르지 않을 때 동일하게 표시되는 것을 확인했습니다.  
데스크톱 및 모바일 브라우저에서는 비밀번호 오류 메시지가 정상적으로 표시되지만, 마이케이티 앱에서는 해당 오류가 "네트워크 오류"로 표시되는 것으로 보입니다.

가능하시다면 KT 계정 비밀번호를 다시 한 번 확인해 주시고, 동일한 문제가 계속 발생하는지 확인 부탁드립니다. 🙇🏻

<details>
<summary>녹화한 확인 영상: 비밀번호 오입력 → "네트워크 오류 안내" 화면, 비밀번호 정상 입력 → 로그인 성공</summary>

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/88fe2971-bff9-40bc-81d9-df1066fc3028

</details>

<details>
<summary>데스크톱 및 모바일 브라우저 확인</summary>

| 데스크톱 (Firefox) | Android (Chrome) |
| :--: | :--: |
| ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c4a7a195-2c1d-4cb9-b21b-3f8db2d4ac53) | ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7cdf9732-becb-4aa1-b239-e90a49d99f5a) |

</details>

---

> In English for coworker: Based on the screenshot, it appears that you are using the Android My KT app.
> 
> I tested the login using my own KT account while AdGuard DNS was enabled, and the authentication completed successfully when the correct password was entered.
> 
> The "Network error" screen shown in your report appears to be displayed when the password is incorrect.  
On desktop and mobile browsers, an incorrect password triggers a proper password error message, but in the My KT app it seems to be shown as a network error instead.
> 
> Could you please double-check your KT account password and see if the issue still occurs?

issue.title: login.kt.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3xlbbpn6omkgwosw8k8kwooooko8csc8bsykcbiwok.jpg?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/j59hi2278w8488ckgs80gk88kg4gos8nuw96zk9e9w.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

Information | Value
--- | ---
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Device or router settings
DNS server: | AdGuard DNS Default server
System version: | `dns.adguard-dns.com`
Browser: | Chrome

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

comment.body:
@hj0210 추가로 확인해 보니 `log.onmas.kt.com` 도메인을 허용해도 문제가 해결되지 않는 것으로 보입니다.

Android 마이케이티 앱의 로그인 과정과 관련된 동작을 추가로 조사해 보겠습니다.

---

> It appears that allowing `log.onmas.kt.com` does not resolve the issue.
>
> I will further investigate the login process of the Android My KT app to understand what may be causing this behavior.
